name: Address reviewer caveats on scientific rigor and evaluation clarity

description: Established a reviewer-caveat audit focused on scientific rigor gaps in the paper/report. Baseline found 7 unresolved issues spanning KL/entropy diagnostics, tool-eval protocol disclosure, codegen subset disclosure, capacity-confound caveats, MoE diagnostics, budgets/splits, and replication-release clarity.

Addressed the main reviewer caveats in the paper/report without inventing new results: added explicit KL/entropy and exploration confounds, clarified custom tool-eval protocol and missing inter-rater reliability, disclosed the 50-problem HumanEval subset, strengthened MoE and split/budget caveats, and made replication-release status explicit.

Strengthened the reviewer-caveat audit to catch three remaining overclaims: 'near-perfect accuracy' phrasing in the paper, a single-seed 4B result being said to confirm the threshold, and a summary table that presented 100% peak training-step GSM8K as if it were benchmark performance.
